headline: How Did Wall Street Sleep Through CAT Stock's 150% Surge?
summary: Before the heavy-machinery giant surged, its own order book was telling a story most investors weren't hearing.

headline: Spotting Winners: Deere (NYSE:DE) And Agricultural Machinery Stocks In Q1
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q1 behind us, let’s have a look at Deere (NYSE:DE) and its peers.

headline: The ‘right to repair’ movement has a point, but consumers should read the warranty fine print first
summary: Manufacturers would benefit from establishing a better, more efficient service network and offering more attractive warranty programs.
